title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Omkar Realtors - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Omkar Realtors - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Omkar Realtors. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Sales Manager to strengthen our Ghaziabad-based team.

About Omkar Realtors:
Omkar Realtors is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Omkar Realtors!
